title: Mindfulness meditation improves emotion regulation and reduces drug abuse
headline: Mindfulness meditation improves emotion regulation and reduces drug abuse
summary: A randomized controlled trial of mindfulness / meditation examined brain & mechanisms. In both smokers and nonsmokers, improved self-control abilities in emotion regulation and stress reduction were found after training and these changes were related to increased ACC/mPFC activity following training. These results indicate that promoting emotion regulation and improving ACC/mPFC brain activity can help for addiction prevention and treatment.
keyFindings: In both smokers and nonsmokers, improved self-control abilities in emotion regulation and stress reduction were found after training and these changes were related to increased ACC/mPFC activity following training.
These results indicate that promoting emotion regulation and improving ACC/mPFC brain activity can help for addiction prevention and treatment.
limitations: Single-trial result; requires replication, and self-reported outcomes may inflate apparent effects.
The practice studied (mindfulness / meditation) is not the Miracle of Mind practice; findings do not transfer directly to MoM.
simplifiedTitle: Mindfulness meditation improves emotion regulation and reduces drug abuse
aiSnippet: RCT, Drug and alcohol dependence (2016). In both smokers and nonsmokers, improved self-control abilities in emotion regulation and stress reduction were found after training and these changes were related to increased ACC/mPFC activity following training. These results indicate that promoting emotion regulation and improving ACC/mPFC brain activity can help for addiction prevention and treatment.
whyItMatters: MoM shares directed attention (the focused-attention component) in a brief, guided format with the practice studied here. Because the benefit is linked to that mechanism rather than to any one method, it's reasonable to expect it may extend to MoM as well — though MoM hasn't been studied directly for this outcome.
